subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou by Whose name all things are enraptured, in Whose love the hearts of all in the kingdom of names are melted!
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان و یدع الکل الی مقام فیه سطع النور و استوی… سبحانک یا من باسمک انجذبت الأشیآء و بحبک ذابت اکباد من فی ملکوت الأسمآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
